changes.summary: Optional list of default string values for a column; used for stringList data types in column defaults_to blocks.
Accepts stringList as a literal type for list-based column values.
When literal.type is stringList, provide comma-separated strings such as item1,item2,item3.
Accepts additional comparison operators including ContainsAny, ContainsAll, ContainsExactly, ContainsSequence, IsSubset, IsSubsequence, and their negated forms.
When enabled is false, the provider runs a full update after create to apply all configured attributes instead of a partial post-create update.
Optional display name for the response asset; can differ from the uploaded filename. Changing name forces replacement.
Read no longer overwrites filename with the API asset name for non-S3 paths; the configured file path is preserved in state.
Updates send name to the API when set; otherwise the filename is used as the asset name.
Export includes the name attribute when the remote asset has a name set.
Optional maximum customer-first callback retry attempts (0-20) when the initial callback does not connect.
Optional delay in seconds between customer-first callback retries (60-86400).
When bullseye_rings is removed from configuration, the provider clears member_groups from existing bullseye rings before applying the update.
Create no longer rejects requests when a script with the same name already exists; duplicate-name conflicts are returned by the Genesys Cloud API.
Updates read the current site from the API and merge configured attributes onto that object, preserving fields not managed in Terraform.
Optional maximum number of concurrent export threads (default 10). Changing this value forces replacement of the export resource.
Export work runs concurrently using the configured max_concurrent_threads limit.
